(30) The Frontend Engineer Forced to Eat Mango - Table of Contents
This whole series is built around MongoDB and Mongoose. I won't explain much else here, since this chapter is really just a table of contents.

A quick word on the series name. "Mango" here is a pun — in Mandarin, MongoDB sounds a lot like the word for mango, so the whole series runs with that joke. Hence the "Frontend Engineer Forced to Eat Mango."
I'd actually written a few similar topics before, like...
The Legend of a Full-Stack Warrior Named Koa
